channel.title: Baduk-R daily ratings update
channel.description: Daily Baduk-R professional rating snapshot: top ranking and biggest recent movers.

item.title: Baduk-R top 10 — 2026-06-04
item.description: Baduk-R ranking snapshot for 2026-06-04: 1. Shin Jinseo (3052), 2. Ding Hao (2995), 3. Li Qincheng (2941), 4. Park Junghwan (2935), 5. Xu Jiayang (2916), 6. Wang Xinghao (2912), 7. Shin Minjun (2905), 8. Yang Kaiwen (2890), 9. Ke Jie (2874), 10. Liao Yuanhe (2874).

item.title: Choi Jeong +69 (30d) — Baduk-R 2774
